subject: Gaming
title: The Streaming Revolution
description: A 60-second lesson on The Streaming Revolution.

hook.text: Twitch turned watching others play into a spectator sport. By 2020, it averaged 2.5 million viewers.

buildup.text: Streaming started with Justin.tv in 2007. Amazon bought and rebranded it as Twitch in 2014.

discovery.text: Streamers became celebrities earning millions from donations, subscriptions, and sponsorships.

twist.text: Some streamers earn more than pro esports players competing in the same games they casually play.

climax.text: Streaming transformed gaming from a solitary hobby into shared mass entertainment.

punchline.text: Watching became bigger than playing. A new medium was born.

quiz.question: How did Twitch originate?
options: It was rebranded from Justin.tv after Amazon acquired it
It was built by Google from scratch
It started as a YouTube feature
